_comment: Instructor-curated HIDDEN fine-tune datasets. These are NOT shown in the
student-facing dataset catalog in SKILL.md — they are surprise/challenge
tasks offered only AFTER a base run finishes (e.g. 'now make the car drive
the finished model's weights (resume=false + load_dir) and trains on the
Each entry: description (shown to the student), dataset_paths (REAL on-server
paths — never invent these), optional data_type (default ios_dataset) and
data_overrides (extra data.* keys, e.g. max_dataset_size). A challenge whose
paths still contain 'PLACEHOLDER' will be refused at submit time.

clockwise.description: Teach the car to drive the loop clockwise (reverse direction).

hall_both.description: Hallway driving in both directions (clockwise and counterclockwise) with no cones — general loop-following on a clear course.

hall_ccw_cones.description: Hallway driving counterclockwise through a cone course — navigating cones in the reverse direction.

hall_cw_cones.description: Hallway driving clockwise through a cone course.

hall_both_cones.description: Hallway driving in both directions through a cone course — combined clockwise and counterclockwise cone navigation.

hall_cones.description: Hallway driving focused on cone navigation — cones present, direction not encoded in the name.

largetrack_cw.description: Large outdoor track driven clockwise — no cones.

largetrack_ccw.description: Large outdoor track driven counterclockwise — no cones.

largetrack_cw_cones.description: Large outdoor track driven clockwise through a cone course.

largetrack_ccw_cones.description: Large outdoor track driven counterclockwise through a cone course.

largetrack_cw_fast.description: Large outdoor track driven clockwise at high speed (superfast) — no cones.

largetrack_ccw_fast.description: Large outdoor track driven counterclockwise at high speed (superfast) — no cones.

outside.description: Outdoor driving — direction not encoded in the name, no cones.
